name: Camera Stream
author: Ava
description: Forward this device camera to Frigate or an NVR. Choose MJPEG or RTSP and tune quality.
detail_description: LAN camera forwarder for Frigate / go2rtc / ffmpeg. Pick MJPEG (HTTP) or RTSP (H.264), then set FPS, resolution, JPEG quality or bitrate. For RTSP you can prefer auto / hardware / software H.264 encoding (auto tries hardware first, then falls back). No auto-start: open this mod’s settings and turn on Enable Stream (or the HA Camera Stream switch) while the voice satellite master service is running. When the master service stops, the stream always stops. Paste the Stream URL into your NVR — not a second HA camera preview.

config.label: Enable Stream
config.description: Start LAN stream (requires voice satellite master service). Off by default — not auto-start.

config.label: Stream Format
config.description: MJPEG over HTTP, or RTSP with H.264 for Frigate / NVR

config.label: H.264 Encoder (RTSP)
config.description: auto = hardware first then software fallback. hardware/software force one path. MJPEG ignores this.

config.label: Listen Port
config.description: TCP port for MJPEG HTTP or RTSP

config.label: Stream Path
config.description: URL path segment, e.g. ava → http://ip:8554/ava or rtsp://ip:8554/ava

config.label: Access Token (optional)
config.description: If set, clients must send Bearer token (or ?token= for MJPEG)
config.dialogHint: leave empty for open LAN access

config.label: Front Camera
config.description: Use front camera when available; off = rear

config.label: Frame Rate
config.description: Lower FPS saves CPU and heat on wall panels

config.label: Bitrate kbps (RTSP)
config.description: H.264 target bitrate when format is RTSP
